title: cirsium jorullense subsp. lanosum
intro: Cirsium jorullense subsp. lanosum, also known as the lanose thistle, is a species of thistle in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cirsium jorullense subsp. lanosum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of arthritis, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. In herbal medicine, preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
